headline: Why Leonardo DRS (DRS) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company Leonardo DRS (NASDAQ:DRS) fell 2.8% in the afternoon session after broader weakness in the defense sector appeared to overshadow the company's own positive news, with concerns sparked by a key contract delay for a major industry peer.

headline: Lockheed Martin Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation [NYSE: LMT] today reported first quarter 2026 sales of $18.0 billion, compared to $18.0 billion in the first quarter of 2025. Net earnings in the first quarter of 2026 were $1.5 billion, or $6.44 per share, compared to $1.7 billion, or $7.28 per share, in the first quarter of 2025. headline: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Security and Aerospace company Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales flat year on year at $18.02 billion. On the other hand, the company’s outlook for the full year was close to analysts’ estimates with revenue guided to $78.75 billion at the midpoint. Its GAAP profit of $6.44 per share was 3.7% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
content.summary: Security and Aerospace company Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales flat year on year at $18.02 billion. On the other hand, the company’s outlook for the full year was close to analysts’ estimates with revenue guided to $78.75 billion at the midpoint. Its GAAP profit of $6.44 per share was 3.7% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: How Boeing Is Pivoting From Crisis To Efficiency
summary: The primary insight within Boeing’s (BA) recent performance is the decoupling of cash flow trajectory from top-line revenue volume. While revenue grew 14% to $22.22 billion, beating consensus, the operating cash flow improved to a deficit of $179 million from a $1.62 billion deficit in the prior year. This $1.44 billion year-over-year improvement suggests that Boeing is successfully reducing the internal friction and quality rework costs that previously prevented its $694.7 billion backlog from

headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: First, I would like to highlight this week's breaking news on a recent win for our Aeronautics business.  Just this past Monday, Lockheed Martin Corporation signed a $1.5 billion contract with the Peruvian Air Force for 12 Block 70 F-16 fighters, with an opportunity for a second squadron of an additional 12 aircraft.  Overall, we reported solid results for the quarter as demand for our premier defense technologies and space exploration capabilities remains high.

content.title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
content.summary: First, I would like to highlight this week's breaking news on a recent win for our Aeronautics business.  Just this past Monday, Lockheed Martin Corporation signed a $1.5 billion contract with the Peruvian Air Force for 12 Block 70 F-16 fighters, with an opportunity for a second squadron of an additional 12 aircraft.  Overall, we reported solid results for the quarter as demand for our premier defense technologies and space exploration capabilities remains high.
